voices.name: Aiden (English, Male)
voices.description: Calm narrator voice, suitable for non-fiction audiobooks.
voices.ref_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This is a sample of a calm narrator voice.

voices.name: Iris (English, Female)
voices.description: Warm female narrator, well suited to fiction and storytelling.
voices.ref_text: Once upon a time, in a quiet village beside a winding river, a curious story began to unfold.
